name: Phase 1 durable research mission and truthful pre-call report
sharedInvariants: Every manual lead starts or resumes one durable bounded research mission.
Operator-entered jurisdiction constraints remain immutable unless the owner explicitly corrects them.
Contradictory or insufficiently associated evidence is quarantined and cannot influence canonical facts, comps, valuation, score, strategy, or the report.
A pre-call report is ready only with verified parcel facts, a parcel-associated visual, qualified sold comps, a sourced market fact, and a Land Score.
Sold land comparables must pass status, age, distance, acreage/type similarity, price, and provenance gates; listings remain context only.
Transcript upload remains downstream of pre-call property research.
LandPortal API and MCP paths remain off-limits; paid actions and offer or contract sending remain prohibited.
browserAssertions: Mission Control, Acquisitions, and Jarvis navigation stays shell-free and retains one application browser tab.
Lead Workspace shows research mission actor, immutable query, attempt, trace, verification, quarantine, gaps, and safe next action.
Unresolved reports show Incomplete — call may proceed plus exact blockers and never claim decision-useful readiness.
Unqualified comp rows never appear in the valuation set and unsupported strategies render only as validation hypotheses.
Truthful report state persists through refresh and canonical managed restart.
knownLimitations: Operating lead 25 remains unresolved because the available evidence did not establish the exact parcel; the report correctly exposes this rather than fabricating research.
An authentic seller discovery call and the owner's usefulness judgment remain outside this correctness-repair sprint.
